name: ringleader-investigation
description: Fraud-ring investigation pipeline: Neo4j graph detection -> LLM investigator -> structured verdict. Deployed to RocketRide Cloud as a production endpoint.

nodes.comment: Runs Cypher ring-detection against Neo4j (shared-identity clustering + circular-flow paths + structuring).
LLM investigator explains each ring in plain English and recommends action.
Merges detector evidence + LLM narrative + evidence subgraph into the final verdict payload.

deploy.notes: Node type names/paths follow the RocketRide Pipeline JSON Reference and are reconciled against the live node registry via the RocketRide MCP at deploy time. The detect_rings/shape_verdict code nodes import src/pipeline/pipeline.ts::runInvestigation.
